root_cause: The top navigation search input was still a read-only command-palette trigger after the V1 layout cleanup. It did not call the parcel search API or dispatch the selected parcel hydration/map focus pipeline.

top_search_behavior.static_fallback: Uses the existing static parcel search index through searchParcelIndex when NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API is false or when the API request fails.

selection_behavior.selected_state: Reuses setSelectedParcelIntelligence from the shared dashboard state.
selection_behavior.map_focus: Normalizes backend map_focus/highlight_geometry and dispatches the existing parcel map focus request so SceneView zoom/cage behavior can run.

preserved_behavior: Parcel Intelligence section search/filter remains available
Selected parcel card uses the shared selected parcel state
Selected parcel development activity panel remains tied to selected parcel state
Selected parcel permit events remain tied to selected parcel state
Selected parcel flood panel remains tied to selected parcel state
FEMA Flood Zones layer remains unchanged

ui_smoke_check.search_result_observed: CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 / 45896367300000 / MALL AT CONCORD MILLS LP
ui_smoke_check.note: A final post-build in-app browser text-entry retry was blocked by the browser automation virtual clipboard, but the page/input, endpoints, and previously observed UI search/detail click path were verified.

remaining_notes: Full visual confirmation of SceneView movement should be checked manually in the live browser because the final automated text-entry pass was limited by browser tooling.
The top search now uses the same selected parcel pipeline as the rest of the app, so fixes to selected parcel focus/detail behavior remain centralized.
